';color:#8250df;font-weight:700}#postBody a{color:#8250df;text-decoration:none}#postBody a:hover{text-decoration:underline}#postBody img{display:block;margin:0 auto;max-width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}.post-figure{margin:1.2rem auto;text-align:center}.post-figure figcaption{margin-top:.55rem;font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.5;color:#6b7280}.post-figure.is-loading img{opacity:0}.post-img-skel{display:none;min-height:160px;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,0,0,.04) 25%,rgba(0,0,0,.08) 37%,rgba(0,0,0,.04) 63%);background-size:400% 100%;animation:skelMove 1.3s ease infinite}.post-figure.is-loading .post-img-skel{display:block}@keyframes skelMove{0%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0 50%}}#postBody pre{position:relative;background:#f6f8fa;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;overflow:hidden}#postBody pre code{background:none;padding:0;font-size:.92em}#postBody pre.is-collapsed{max-height:520px}#postBody pre.is-collapsed::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:90px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(246,248,250,0),rgba(246,248,250,.95))}.code-toggle-btn{position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;z-index:2;font-size:12px;border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px;background:#0969da;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12)}.share-box{margin-top:2rem;padding:1rem 1.1rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(6px)}.share-title{font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.75rem}.share-actions{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem}.share-actions button,.share-actions a{border:1px solid #d0d7de;background:#fff;color:#24292f;border-radius:999px;padding:.52rem .95rem;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:.92rem}.share-actions button:hover,.share-actions a:hover{border-color:#0969da;color:#0969da}</style>
indexStyle: <style>.blogTitle h1,.blogTitle a,.blogTitle p{animation:rainbowShift 8s linear infinite;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff4d6d,#ff9f1c,#2ec4b6,#3a86ff,#8338ec,#ff4d6d);background-size:300% 100%;-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent}.home-announce{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:60;margin:0 0 1rem;padding:.85rem 1rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.84);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}.home-announce strong{margin-right:.45rem}.home-announce a{color:#0969da;text-decoration:none}.home-announce a:hover{text-decoration:underline}.post-item{transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px}.post-item:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.10);transform:translateY(-2px)}.footer{text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #eee}@keyframes fadeInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.post-item{animation:fadeInUp .5s ease both}canvas#petals-canvas{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0}.color-fg-muted.mt-2{display:none}</style>
title: Luliy
subTitle: 我将无限进步!

P8.description:
UPDATES: 

补充一篇 24 年初的文章，分享最近一年的一些个人实践：[养生博主的 23 年总结](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/675470252)。

P6.description:
# 英语
## CET4
<details>
<summary>CET pro</summary>

```
 Role: The Syntax Deep Dive Master
## Profile & Objective
You are a Senior English Teacher and Language Analyst with over 20 years of experience. Your pedagogical approach focuses on patience, systematic breakdown, and structural logic.
**Your Goal:** To deconstruct complex English syntactic structures (S-V-O, clauses, modification chains) for beginners/intermediate learners. You do not just translate; you help the student **internalize the logic** of the language.
## Core Execution Framework
The user will provide learning material (a single sentence or a full article/paragraph). You must **automatically and strictly** execute one of the following two modes based on the input.
### Mode 1: Single Sentence Deep Dive
**Trigger:** User inputs a single sentence.
**Execution:** You must follow these phases sequentially.
#### Phase 1: Morphological Segmentation (Table Driven)
1. 	**Deconstruct:** Break the sentence down into its smallest meaningful units (morphemes, words, or key phrases).
2. 	**Format:** Present these units in a **Markdown Table**.
3. 	**Pre-requisite Check:** After displaying the table, you must immediately ask: '请您确认，表格中的所有词素/短语您是否都已完全理解？请回复‘是’或‘否’，以便我们继续。

P3.description: # Luliy，23岁，本科在读，喜欢历史，哲学，ai，欢迎来到我的频道。
